about.title: About Me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Iris Peters — a fullstack developer based in 's-Hertogenbosch, the Netherlands. I build web applications, cloud infrastructure, and everything in between.
about.background: With a Bachelor's in Computer Software Engineering from Avans Hogeschool, I've spent 4+ years working across the full stack. From building CI/CD pipelines and Azure infrastructure at Info Support, to developing AR applications on the HoloLens 2, to my current role as a fullstack medior developer at Gynzy building educational software.
about.backgroundText: With a Bachelor's in Computer Software Engineering from Avans Hogeschool, I've spent 4+ years working across the full stack. From building CI/CD pipelines and Azure infrastructure at Info Support, to developing AR applications on the HoloLens 2, to my current role as a fullstack medior developer at Gynzy building educational software.
about.whatIDo: I enjoy working across the entire stack — whether that's crafting responsive frontends with Flutter, Ember.js, or React, designing cloud architectures on Azure, or setting up robust DevOps pipelines. I'm always looking to learn new technologies and improve my craft.
about.whatIDoText: I enjoy working across the entire stack — whether that's crafting responsive frontends with Flutter, Ember.js, or React, designing cloud architectures on Azure, or setting up robust DevOps pipelines. I'm always looking to learn new technologies and improve my craft.
about.beyondCode: When I'm not coding, you can find me enjoying one of my hobbies. My greatest passion so far in life has definitely been HEMA (Historical European Martial Arts), where I fight with a two handed sword called a federschwert.
about.beyondCodeText: When I'm not coding, you can find me enjoying one of my hobbies. My greatest passion so far in life has definitely been HEMA (Historical European Martial Arts), where I fight with a two handed sword called a federschwert.
hobbies: DM-ing a few Cyberpunk Red games
Trying to develop games whenever I have time
And if there is anything left after all that, making my house a little bit better day by day

projectData.title: Gynzy Education Platform
projectData.shortDescription: Cross-platform educational software built with Flutter and Ember.js for classrooms.
projectData.description: Contributing to Gynzy's interactive education platform used by teachers and students. Working as a fullstack medior developer building features across the Flutter mobile/desktop app and the Ember.js web application. Focus on delivering intuitive, reliable tools for classroom use.

projectData.title: Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
projectData.shortDescription: Azure cloud solutions and DevOps pipelines across multiple enterprise clients.
projectData.description: Designed and maintained cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines for six enterprise clients at Info Support — including Air Miles, Moba Group, and Agrifac Machinery. Built infrastructure-as-code with Bicep, automated deployments via Azure DevOps, and developed .NET microservices running on Azure Functions.
features: Automated CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps

projectData.title: HoloLens AR Workspaces
projectData.shortDescription: Virtual screens in augmented reality on the Microsoft HoloLens 2 for remote workers.
projectData.description: Built an augmented reality application for the Microsoft HoloLens 2 that creates virtual screens for remote office workers. The project explored how AR can replace physical monitors, enabling flexible workspaces anywhere. Developed with Unity3D, C#, UWP, and the Mixed Reality Toolkit.
features: Virtual screen placement in AR space
Hand tracking and gesture interaction via MRTK
Spatial anchoring for persistent screen positions

projectData.title: Mobile App — Colours Agency
projectData.shortDescription: Cross-platform mobile application built with React Native at a digital agency.
projectData.description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application during an internship at Colours, a digital agency in 's-Hertogenbosch. Gained hands-on experience building production React Native apps, working within a professional team, and delivering for real clients.

projectData.title: This Portfolio
projectData.shortDescription: The site you're looking at — built with React, Three.js, and Framer Motion.
projectData.description: A bold, modern developer portfolio featuring a 3D interactive hero, theme switching, scroll-driven animations, and responsive design. Built to showcase fullstack development skills.
features: 3D interactive hero with React Three Fiber

experienceData.description: Building educational software as a fullstack developer. Working with Flutter for cross-platform development and Ember.js for web applications in a hybrid team environment.
Consulted as a DevOps engineer across multiple client organizations. Completed intensive training in C#, Angular, Docker, Entity Framework, and secure programming.
Developed virtual screens in augmented reality on the Microsoft HoloLens 2 for remote office workers. Built with Unity3D, C#, UWP, and the Mixed Reality Toolkit (MRTK).
Developed software solutions at a communication technology company, gaining hands-on experience with professional development workflows and team collaboration.
Built cross-platform mobile applications using React Native during an internship at a digital agency in 's-Hertogenbosch.
Bachelor of Applied Science in Computer Software Engineering. Built a strong foundation in software architecture, web development, and agile project management.
